title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Shriram Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Shriram Finance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Shriram Finance in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Shriram Finance:
Shriram Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shriram Finance!
